title: rubus fallens
intro: Rubus fallens, also known as the false bramble or autumn raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus fallens include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antimicrobial properties. Rubus fallens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in herbal remedies to support digestive health and immune function.
